SourceProxy.name: SHYXVectorFieldTopology
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Vector Field Topology

Documentation.long_help: Extract critical points, separatrix lines and optional surfaces, and boundary-switch structures using VTK vtkVectorFieldTopology (steady vector fields on vtkImageData, vtkUnstructuredGrid, or vtkUniformGridAMR).
Documentation.short_help: Vector field topology (critical points and separatrices).

SourceProxy.Documentation: Computes the topological skeleton of a vector field: critical points, 1D separatrices, optional 2D separatrices in 3D, and boundary-switch seeds when enabled. Integration options follow vtkStreamTracer units (length or cell length).

InputProperty.name: Input
InputProperty.Documentation: vtkImageData, vtkUnstructuredGrid, or composite/AMR containing uniform grids. Point-centered 3-component vectors.

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectInputVectors
StringVectorProperty.label: Vectors
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Vector array used for topology extraction.

IntVectorProperty.label: Integration Step Unit
IntVectorProperty.name: IntegrationStepUnit
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Unit for integration step size and separatrix offset (vtkStreamTracer LENGTH_UNIT / CELL_LENGTH_UNIT).

DoubleVectorProperty.label: Integration Step Size
DoubleVectorProperty.name: IntegrationStepSize
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Step size for line/surface integration, in the chosen integration step unit.

IntVectorProperty.label: Maximum Number of Steps
IntVectorProperty.name: MaxNumSteps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum integration steps for stream-based separatrix computation.

DoubleVectorProperty.label: Separatrix Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.name: SeparatrixDistance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Offset from saddles (and related seeds) when seeding separatrices, in the integration step unit.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseIterativeSeeding
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Use iterative (more accurate) surface seeding instead of the fast approximation.

IntVectorProperty.name: ComputeSurfaces
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: For 3D data, compute separating surfaces (2D separatrices) in addition to lines.

IntVectorProperty.name: ExcludeBoundary
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Remove cells that touch the domain boundary before analysis (e.g. no-slip walls).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseBoundarySwitchPoints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Seed separatrices from boundary switch points (2D) or lines (3D). Not supported for AMR in VTK.

DoubleVectorProperty.label: Vector Angle Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.name: VectorAngleThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Boundary switch noise filter: ignore when |dot(unit v0, unit v1)| exceeds this threshold (0–1).

DoubleVectorProperty.label: Offset Away From Boundary
DoubleVectorProperty.name: OffsetAwayFromBoundary
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Inward shift of seeds relative to SeparatrixDistance (see VTK header).

DoubleVectorProperty.label: Epsilon (Critical Point)
DoubleVectorProperty.name: EpsilonCriticalPoint
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Tolerance for classifying critical points from Jacobian eigenvalues.

IntVectorProperty.name: InterpolatorType
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Velocity interpolator for integration: point locator (faster) or cell locator (more robust).
